$comment: Canonical English catalog for @elvix.is/sdk. Every key here must exist in every other locale. Bulk translation lifts from this file via the DC translate engine.

errorRateLimited.other: Too many attempts. Wait a moment.

bootstrapErrorBody.other: Invalid {clientIdToken} or origin not allowed for this domain. Open Console, your Application, Credentials to confirm the {clientIdToken}, then add this origin to Allowed origins.

errorPasskeyAdd.other: Passkey couldn't be added. Try again or skip for now.

passkeyOnboardingSubtitle.other: Touch ID, Face ID, or your security key. No more email codes.

recoverSubtitle.other: Pick whether to come back or stay away.

identifierSubtitle.other: Pick how you want to continue.

passkeyBullet1.other: No more password or email codes

passkeyBullet2.other: Phish-proof. Works only on this site.

passkeyBullet3.other: Syncs across your devices via iCloud, Google, or 1Password

previewEmptyMethods.other: Enable at least one method to preview the sign-in.

errorTooRecent.other: Wait a moment before requesting another code.

errorTooManyWithRetry.other: Too many codes sent to this email. Try again in {retry}.

errorTooMany.other: Too many codes sent to this email. Try again later.

errorInvalidCode.other: That code didn't work. Try again.

errorExpired.other: That code expired. Send a new one.

errorSendFailed.other: Couldn't send the email. Check the address.

errorUserPaused.other: Your access has been paused. Contact support.

errorUsernameNotFound.other: No account with that username here.

errorMethodDisabled.other: That sign-in method isn't enabled for this app.

errorGraceExpired.other: The 90-day window to restore has closed.

errorSessionEnded.other: Your session ended. Sign in again.

confirmOthersBody.other: Pick which sessions to end. Each one is revoked the moment you tap, and every tab on that device falls back to signed out within seconds.

confirmAllBody.other: Includes this device. You'll be redirected to sign in again afterwards.

massRevokeCtaSelf.other: Sign me out of this device

confirmChooserBody.other: Pick which sessions to end. Each one is revoked the moment you tap, and every tab on that device is signed out on its next request.

signOutOtherDevicesCount.one: Sign out of the other {count} device
signOutOtherDevicesCount.other: Sign out of the other {count} devices

signOutAllCtaSelf.other: Sign me out of this device

signOutAllCtaIncludingThis.other: Sign out everywhere, this device too

signOutAllRedirectHint.other: You'll land on the sign-in page right after

confirmTokensFootnote.other: Already-issued tokens stay rejected. There's no undo, but signing back in on any device just works again.

doneFootnote.other: Your current device is still signed in. Those other tabs will be kicked out on their next request.

errorTooLarge.other: Image too large. Pick under {limitMb} MB.

errorBadType.other: Pick a PNG, JPG, or WebP image.

uploadFailed.other: Couldn't upload photo. Try a different image.

removeConfirmBody.other: Falls back to the gradient placeholder.

errorUpload.other: Couldn't upload banner. Try a different image.

subtitle.other: This is how people see you on {app}.

subtitleNoApp.other: This is how people see you.

rulesHint.other: 4 to 30 chars, a to z, 0 to 9, dot, underscore. Must start with a letter.

reasonBadChars.other: Only a to z, 0 to 9, dot, underscore.

reasonConsecutiveSpecial.other: No two dots or underscores in a row.

reasonTrailingSpecial.other: Cannot end with a dot or underscore.

errorJustTaken.other: That username was just taken. Pick another.

errorFormat.other: That username doesn't match the rules.

ruleStartEnd.other: start with a letter, end with a letter or digit

ruleNoDoubles.other: no two specials in a row, no reserved words

confirmBody.other: Anyone signing into this app with this username will be you. You can change it again any time.

doneBody.other: We saved it. You can keep using this surface, or head back when you're ready.

disabledBody.other: The app owner currently has username sign-in disabled, so we can't let you set or change your username here.

disabledStillHave.other: You still have @{current} from before. It stays on your membership until the app owner turns the feature back on.

disabledNoSupport.other: The app hasn't published a support contact yet. Reach out through whatever channel you usually use with them.

disabledHint.other: Ask them to flip Username sign-in back on in Console, Sign-in methods. Once they do, you can come back here and pick a username.

idleCurrent.other: Currently @{current}. Type something different to change it.

idleEmpty.other: Pick a name other people on this app can use to find you.

takenLine.other: Someone else on this app already has @{username}.

currentLine.other: That's the username you already have here.

reasonMustEndAlnum.other: Must end with a letter or digit.

reasonNoDoubleSpecial.other: Can't have two dots or underscores in a row.

reasonReserved.other: That username is reserved. Pick another.

confirmBody.other: Changing country cascades currency and first day of week.

emptyHint.other: UI language, time zone, currency, and date format follow your country.

cascadeHint.other: We'll set your UI language, time zone, currency, and date format from this. You can override each one later.

cascadeResetBody.other: You're moving from {currentFlag} {currentName} to {nextFlag} {nextName}. UI language, time zone, currency, date format, and units will all reset to the defaults for {nextName}. Your custom edits (if any) will be overwritten.

weekStartsHint.other: Affects calendars, week pickers, and weekly reports.

pickOneHint.other: Pick the one that feels right.

uiLanguageHint.other: What language elvix-powered apps should speak to you in.

currencyHint.other: Default for prices, invoices, and payouts in elvix-powered apps.

timeZoneHint.other: Used for scheduling, "9am your time", and weekly reports.

limitReached.other: You can list up to {limit} languages.

emptyHint.other: For UI defaults, jobs, and outbound messages.

searchHint.other: Search by English name, native name, or ISO code.

levelPickSubtitle.other: Pick the level that sounds right. You can change it later.

errorAlreadyAdded.other: You've already added this language. Edit its level from the list.

removeConfirmBody.other: Apps that target {language} won't reach you in it anymore. You can re-add it any time.

useForBilling.other: We'll use this for invoices and receipts.

useForShipping.other: We'll use this for deliveries and pickups.

aptFloorBodyBilling.other: Maps rarely captures unit numbers. Adds a second line to the address.

aptFloorBodyShipping.other: Carriers misroute without unit info. Skip if you don't need it.

recipientTitleBilling.other: Who is this billing address for?

recipientTitleShipping.other: Who is this shipping address for?

someoneElseSubtitleBilling.other: A different name for the invoice

businessSubtitleShipping.other: Ship to a company or workplace

recipientCustomSubtitleBilling.other: The name that will appear on the invoice.

recipientCustomSubtitleShipping.other: The name that will appear on the package.

companyNameBodyBilling.other: Appears on the invoice. Required for B2B tax handling later.

attnBodyInvoice.other: Adds an "Attn:" line to the invoice. Skip to address it to the company.

attnBodyPackage.other: Adds an "Attn:" line to the package. Skip to address it to the company.

noteChoiceTitle.other: Want to add a delivery note?

noteChoiceBodyBilling.other: Anything the billing team should know. ATTN line, PO number, c/o someone.

noteChoiceBodyShipping.other: Anything for the delivery person. Buzzer, gate code, leave-at-door.

noteInputBodyBilling.other: Appears on the invoice or billing record.

noteInputBodyShipping.other: Hands off to the delivery carrier.

notePlaceholderShipping.other: Ring buzzer 3, leave with concierge if not home.

setDefaultSubtitle.other: It'll be the auto-pick at checkout or invoice time.

removeDefaultSubtitle.other: Nothing will be pre-selected at checkout or invoice time.

crossAppHeadsUp.other: Heads up. This affects every app you use with elvix.

crossAppDefaultBodySetting.other: Your default {kind} address is shared across every app you sign in to. Switching it here updates the auto-pick everywhere at once.

crossAppDefaultBodyClearing.other: Your default {kind} address is shared across every app you sign in to. Removing it means no address is pre-selected anywhere; you'll pick one each time at checkout or invoice.

crossAppDeleteBodyBilling.other: Your billing address is stored once on your elvix profile and shared with the apps you sign in to. Deleting removes it everywhere. Any checkout, invoice, or shipping flow that referenced this address will need a fresh one.

crossAppDeleteBodyShipping.other: Your shipping address is stored once on your elvix profile and shared with the apps you sign in to. Deleting removes it everywhere. Any checkout, invoice, or shipping flow that referenced this address will need a fresh one.

missingFieldsHint.other: We're missing the {fields}. Pick a more specific suggestion (with a street number) so we can save a deliverable address.

addCtaSubtitle.other: For invoices, contracts, and tax filings.

typeChoiceTitle.other: What kind of entity is this?

typeChoiceSubtitle.other: Drives the questions we'll ask next.

individualSubtitle.other: Just you, no business. Invoices go in your personal name.

soleProprietorshipSubtitle.other: You plus a trading name (Einzelunternehmen, freelancer, etc.).

companySubtitle.other: A registered legal entity (GmbH, Ltd, S.r.l., etc.).

legalNameSubtitleIndividual.other: As it appears on your ID.

legalNameSubtitleSoleProp.other: The natural person operating the business.

legalNameInvalidCompany.other: Enter at least 2 characters with at least one letter.

legalNameInvalidPerson.other: Enter both given name and family name.

tradingNameSubtitle.other: Geschaeftsbezeichnung, DBA, doing-business-as. The brand the entity trades under.

dobSubtitle.other: Required for invoicing under your name and KYC if a customer asks later.

dobAgeError.other: You must be 18 or older to register an entity.

dobOutOfRange.other: That date is out of range.

placeOfBirthSubtitle.other: City as it appears on your ID. Required for invoicing and KYC.

nationalitySubtitle.other: Pick one or more (up to {max}). The first one is treated as primary.

nationalityCapReached.other: Maximum of {max} nationalities reached. Remove one to add another.

taxCountrySubtitle.other: Where the entity files taxes. Only countries where we can verify the tax ID live are listed.

taxIdsSubtitleIndividual.other: Your local tax number from {country}. Stored as-is.

taxIdsSubtitleCompany.other: VAT is validated live against {authority}. Local tax number is optional.

taxIdsSubtitleSoleProp.other: Both are optional. Add the local tax number if you want it on invoices; VAT only if you're VAT-registered. The business registration is captured in the next step.

blockReasonTaxIdRequired.other: Enter the local tax number to continue.

blockReasonTaxIdFormat.other: Local tax number doesn't match {country} format. {hint}

blockReasonVatRequired.other: Enter a VAT / company ID to continue.

blockReasonVatFormat.other: This VAT ID doesn't match the country's format.

verifySubtitleInvalid.other: {authority} doesn't list {vatId} as registered. Go back to fix it.

verifySubtitleFormat.other: We couldn't reach {authority} right now. Your entry is saved as-is and will re-verify automatically.

registrationSubtitle.other: Handelsregister, Companies House, KvK. The official register where this entity is recorded.

registeredSinceRangeError.other: Pick a date between 1900 and today.

regNumberFormatHint.other: Doesn't match the expected format. Try: {placeholder}.

addressSearchSubtitle.other: Where the entity is registered with the authority. Start typing.

addressReviewSubtitle.other: Make sure the registered seat matches the official register.

addressMissing.other: We're missing the {fields}. Pick a more specific suggestion.

addressAptSubtitle.other: Adds a second line to the registered address. Skip if not needed.

contactChoiceSubtitle.other: Optional email plus phone for this entity. Separate from your main account contact.

contactInputSubtitle.other: Email plus phone shown on invoices and contracts.

contactEmailInvalid.other: Enter a valid email or leave blank.

contactPhoneInvalid.other: Use digits with an optional leading + (6 to 20 digits).

sharedAcrossAppsHeading.other: Heads up. This affects every app you use with elvix.

deleteSharedAcrossAppsBody.other: Legal entities are shared across apps you sign in to. Deleting removes the record everywhere; any invoice template that referenced it will need a fresh one.

defaultConfirmTitleSet.other: Set this as your default entity?

defaultConfirmBodySet.other: Default entity auto-fills invoices and contract templates.

defaultConfirmBodyUnset.other: Nothing will be pre-selected when you generate invoices or contracts.

defaultSharedAcrossAppsBodySet.other: The default entity is shared across every app you sign in to. Switching it here updates the auto-pick everywhere at once.

defaultSharedAcrossAppsBodyUnset.other: The default entity is shared across every app you sign in to. Removing it means no entity is pre-selected anywhere.

body.other: Get a copy of everything we hold on you. GDPR Article 15. We email a single-use download link, valid for 24 hours.

doneBody.other: We sent a download link to {email}. It expires in 24 hours.

previewLoadFailed.other: Couldn't load the preview. Try again.

archiveBlurbIdentity.other: Your archive will contain a single JSON file with everything below, plus your avatar and banner images if you've uploaded any, plus a README that explains each section in plain language and includes the GDPR Art. 15(1) disclosures.

archiveBlurbApp.other: Your archive will contain a single JSON file scoped to {label}, plus a README that explains each section and includes the GDPR Art. 15(1) disclosures.

notIncluded.other: Not included: cryptographic key material on your passkeys, OAuth tokens, OTP codes, and any data the apps you use hold about you outside elvix. Contact each app for the latter.

sendToHeading.other: We'll send your data to your primary email

sendToBody.other: Your archive will land in {email} as a .zip attachment. Possession of this inbox is the proof of identity, so the file never lives at a public URL.

sendToNotice.other: We send a 6-digit code to your primary inbox first. After you enter it on the next screen, we generate your archive and email it to you as a .zip attachment.

otpBody.other: We sent a 6-digit code to {email}. It expires in 10 minutes. Once you enter it we'll generate your archive and email it to the same inbox as a .zip attachment.

confirmCta.other: Confirm and email me my data

noPendingCode.other: No pending code. Send a fresh one.

doneInboxBody.other: Check your primary inbox ({email}) in a minute. Your archive is attached to the email as a .zip file. You can request another export of the same target in 24 hours.

errorChallengeGeneric.other: Couldn't send a code. Try again.

errorChallengeTooMany.other: Too many requests this hour. Try later.

errorChallengeSendFailed.other: Couldn't email the code. Try again.

errorChallengeRateLimit.other: You already exported this in the last 24 hours. Available again in ~{hours}h.

errorChallengeNotMember.other: You're not a member of this app any more.

errorApplyGeneric.other: Couldn't generate your export. Try again.

errorApplyLocked.other: Too many wrong attempts. Send a fresh code.

errorApplyExpired.other: That code expired. Send a fresh one.

errorApplyGenerateFailed.other: We couldn't build your export. Try again.

errorApplyStorageFailed.other: We couldn't store your export. Try again.

errorApplyEmailFailed.other: Your archive was generated but the email failed. Contact {email} to recover the link.

body.other: Deactivating hides your account from this app. Reactivate any time from your elvix account.

errorTooMany.other: Too many codes requested. Try again later.

errorSendFailed.other: Couldn't email the code. Try again.

errorRequestFailed.other: Couldn't request a code. Try again.

errorChallengeLocked.other: Too many wrong attempts. Request a new code.

errorChallengeExpired.other: That code expired. Request a new one.

errorAlreadyLeft.other: You've already left this app. Restore your membership first.

warn1Body.other: Your profile takes a quiet break. People on {app} stop seeing you, but everything you've built up stays exactly as it is. Whenever you're ready, come back here and sign back in.

warn2Bullet1.other: Open sessions on this app get signed out right away.

warn2Bullet2.other: Your username and identifier stay yours. No one else can take them while you're away.

warn2Bullet3.other: You can come back any time from this same surface.

warn2Bullet4.other: We'll email you a 6-digit code to confirm. Belt and braces, so the change only goes through if you've also got your inbox.

warn2Cta.other: I understand. Email me a code

reactivateBody.other: You're on a break right now. Reactivate to show up again on {app}.

reactivateBodyByOwner.other: You're on a break right now (an admin did this on your behalf). Reactivate to show up again on {app}.

doneDeactivatedBody.other: We let the app know. Come back here any time to reactivate.

doneReactivatedBody.other: Your membership is active again. Open sessions on the app side may take a moment to refresh.

otpDelivered.other: We emailed a 6-digit code to {email}. It expires in 10 minutes.

otpPending.other: We're sending a 6-digit code to your email.

body.other: Removes your membership. This is final: the owner cannot bring it back. Your elvix account stays open.

errorTooManyCodes.other: Too many codes requested. Try again later.

errorSendFailed.other: Couldn't email the code. Try again.

errorRequestFailed.other: Couldn't request a code. Try again.

errorChallengeLocked.other: Too many wrong attempts. Request a new code.

errorChallengeExpired.other: That code expired. Request a new one.

errorOwnerInitiated.other: An admin removed you. They have to reverse this from their Console.

errorGraceExpired.other: The 90-day window to restore this membership has closed.

warn1Body.other: Your membership is hidden right away. You have 90 days to change your mind and restore from this same surface. After that, the app stops showing up in your list. Your data on the app's side stays governed by their own policies.

warn2Body.other: elvix doesn't store or delete what {app} keeps about you. The app owner is responsible for that under their own privacy policy and terms of service. We notify the app the moment you leave so they can act according to those terms. Read them before you confirm.

warn2EmailPrompt.other: We'll email you a code to confirm. Do you understand?

warn2Cta.other: I understand. Email me a code

restoreBody.one: You have {count} day left in the grace window. Restore now and the app sees you exactly as before: same username, same roles, same history.
restoreBody.other: You have {count} days left in the grace window. Restore now and the app sees you exactly as before: same username, same roles, same history.

ownerLockedBody.one: Removed {date}. The app owner has {count} day left to cancel from their side. After that the app no longer shows up here.
ownerLockedBody.other: Removed {date}. The app owner has {count} days left to cancel from their side. After that the app no longer shows up here.

ownerLockedReachOut.other: Because they initiated the removal, only they can reverse it. Reach out through their support channel if you want to talk to them about it.

doneLeftBody.other: We notified the app. You have 90 days to come back and restore from this same surface. After that, the app stops appearing in your list.

doneRestoredBody.other: Your membership is active again. The app side may take a moment to refresh.

bannedBody.other: An administrator banned your account for this app. You'll be signed out and won't be able to sign back in. Contact the owner if you think this was a mistake.

pausedBody.other: An administrator temporarily paused your account for this app. You'll be signed out shortly; reach out to the owner to restore access.

deletedBody.other: An administrator deleted your membership for this app. You'll be signed out and your stored data is queued for purge in 90 days unless restored.

inactiveTitle.other: You're taking a break from this app.

inactiveBody.other: Your membership is deactivated, so we'll sign you out here. You can reactivate from your elvix account any time and come right back.

recoverRestoredBody.other: Your membership is active again. Continue to the app whenever you're ready.

recoverSignedOutBody.other: You stayed off {app}. Come back any time.

recoverDeletedDaysLeft.one: You have {count} day left to come back.
recoverDeletedDaysLeft.other: You have {count} days left to come back.

recoverDeletedNoCountdown.other: You're still inside the restore window.

recoverDeletedOutro.other: Restore your spot now or sign back out.

recoverPausedBody.other: Your membership on {app} is on pause right now. Restore to pick up where you left off, or sign back out and stay away.
